event: Saint Dorothy with Basket of Fruit and Flowers
symbols: basket of fruit and flowers — the miraculous gift sent from paradise, proving the reality of heaven at her martyrdom
elegant dress — her noble birth and the beauty of Christian virtue
downcast gaze — humility and contemplative devotion
description: A full-length figure of a young woman shown in profile facing left against a dark background. She wears a sumptuous pink-mauve satin skirt with voluminous folds and a striped yellow-and-brown slashed-sleeve bodice. Her dark hair is pinned up with a small ornament. She holds a shallow basket or plate bearing fruits and flowers at waist height. An inscription at the lower left reads 'S. DOROTEA.' Her posture is graceful and her expression serene with a downward gaze.
